title: Picture Axe
description: Place images from the web into your Minecraft world in various ways. From beds, banners, and shields you can put images onto vast array of things.
body:
---

## Decorate your world with any image from the web!
**PicAxe** is the ultimate decoration mod that gives you the power to bring any image from the internet directly into your Minecraft world. Personalize your base like never before by applying custom textures to beds, banners, shields, and a variety of new, versatile blocks. Make your world uniquely yours!

---

## Features
* **The PicAxe Tool**: A special tool used to copy and paste image URLs. **Sneak + Right-Click** in the air to open a simple UI and store your link.
* **Image Beds**: Convert any vanilla bed into a canvas! Apply your image and cycle through different styles, from a full drape to a simple sheet pattern.
* **Image Banners & Shields**: Turn a banner into a high-definition picture that waves in the wind. Combine it with a shield in a crafting grid to take your art into battle!
* **6-Sided Image Block**: A creative block that can have a different, unique image applied to each of its six faces. Perfect for detailed displays and hidden art.
* **Resizable Image Frame**: A dynamic frame block that can be resized from **1x1 up to 6x6**. Configure it to either stretch the image to fit or keep its original aspect ratio.
* **Simple to Use**: A single, unified system controls everything. Just **Right-Click** with the **PicAxe** to apply images and configure your blocks.

---
![Show case](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Eghza5kG/images/4810d62f8a77de2041b75bb1569768ea73463381.png)
---

## How to Use
1.  **Copy an Image URL**: Find an image on the web and copy its URL. *(Pro-tip: Use URLs that end in .png or .jpg for best results!)*
2.  **Store the URL**: Hold your **PicAxe** and **Sneak + Right-Click** in the air to open the URL input screen. Paste your link and click "Confirm".
3.  **Apply the Image**:
    * **Right-click** on any vanilla Bed, Banner, or one of the new blocks (Image Frame, 6-Sided Block) to apply the stored image. This will convert the vanilla block into its "Image" version.
4.  **Configure Blocks**:
    * **Image Beds**: Right-click an Image Bed again with the *same URL* on your PicAxe to cycle through its different rendering styles.
    * **6-Sided Block**: To apply an image to a specific face, simply right-click on that face with the PicAxe.
    * **Image Frame**: After applying an image, right-click the frame again to open its config screen where you can set its size (Width/Height) and toggle the stretch mode.

---

# Crafting Recipes
### **Pixel Dust (x16)**
*A mystical powder that fuels all image-based crafting.*

**Shapeless Recipe:**
* 4x Redstone
* 4x Lapis Lazuli
* 1x Diamond

---
### **PicAxe Tool**
*A magical axe used to store and apply image URLs.*
```
 P 
PAP
 P 
```
* **P** = Pixel Dust
* **A** = Iron Axe

---
### **Image Frame**
*A resizable frame for your pictures.*
```
GPG
PLP
GPG
```
* **G** = Glass Pane
* **P** = Pixel Dust
* **L** = Any Log

---
### **6-Sided Image Block**
*A block with a canvas on every face.*
```
GPG
PLP
GPG
```
* **G** = Glass
* **P** = Pixel Dust
* **L** = Any Log

---
### **Image Shield**
*Display your art while defending yourself.*

**Shapeless Recipe:**
* 1x Shield
* 1x Image Banner

---

## Inspiration
This mod was inspired by the original **[Images](https://modrinth.com/mod/images)** mod.

---

## Installation
**This mod requires the Architectury API** or **Balm API**. Please make sure to install the right one for your version!

### For Fabric 1.20-1.21:
1.  Download and install the **[Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)**.
2.  Download the **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**.
3.  Download the **[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)**.
4.  Place the **PicAxe mod .jar** and the downloaded APIs into your `mods` folder.

### For NeoForge 1.20-1.21:
1.  Download and install the latest version of **[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)**.
2.  Download the **[Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)**.
3.  Place the **PicAxe mod .jar** and Architectury API into your `mods` folder.

### For Fabric 1.21.5+:
1.  Download and install the **[Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/)**.
2.  Download the **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)**.
3.  Download the **[Balm API](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm/versions)**.
4.  Place the **PicAxe mod .jar** and the downloaded APIs into your `mods` folder.

### For NeoForge 1.21.5+:
1.  Download and install the latest version of **[NeoForge](https://neoforged.net/)**.
2.  Download the **[Balm API](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm/versions)**.
3.  Place the **PicAxe mod .jar** and Architectury API into your `mods` folder.
